# pinch

Pinch/zoom gesture (Apple simulator or macOS app session)

## Usage

```bash
agent-device pinch <scale> [x] [y]
```

## Session Requirement

Usually expects an active session.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- None

## Platform Coverage

| Target | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| iOS sim | Yes |
| iOS device | No |
| tvOS sim | Yes |
| macOS | Yes |
| Android emu | No |
| Android device | No |
| Android TV | No |
